title: richhabits/sam
summary: A free, private, local-first AI assistant that actually does the work — 167 tools, a team of 78 AI agents, 40 rotating free AI brains, 25 skills. Not a chatbot, a doer. It doesn't just answer — it handles it.

summary: Local-first GenAI lab with a React frontend and Spring Boot backend, supporting Ollama, Amazon Bedrock, Hugging Face, RAG document retrieval, MCP-backed AWS tools, streaming chat, persistent sessions, and artifact/report workflows.

summary: 🧠 Enhance AI with OpenMemory for long-term memory storage, recall, and explanation, using a unique cognitive architecture.

summary: Top Autonomous Multi-Agent Dialogue Systems for AI Character Emergence (2026)

title: Tencent/WeKnora
summary: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

title: gary23w/nl-veil
summary: A swarm of autonomous AI minds, unified and steered by a single consciousness - the Veil. Runs on any language model.

title: pavanbadempet/AI-Healthcare-System
summary: Privacy-first AI Healthcare platform for HIPAA-compliant clinical workflows. Features a stateful LangGraph & MAF multi-agent RAG system, local Ollama LLMs, FastAPI, and React. Integrates PySpark Medallion Lakehouse analytics, HAPI FHIR patient imports, medical diagnostics ML models, and secure EHR hospital operations.

title: AronMav/opex
summary: Self-hosted AI agent gateway built like infrastructure, not a chat app. A Rust core runs agents, tools, memory, cron, secrets. Agents live in Telegram / Discord / Slack / Matrix / WhatsApp; personas in Markdown, tools in YAML, hot-reloaded. Encrypted vault, DNS-level SSRF guard, sandboxed code exec.

title: ScottishSaint/ollama-api-pool
summary: 🚀 Simplify API management with Ollama API Pool, a robust solution for seamless integration and optimized performance in your projects.

title: bulletinmybeard/agent-forge
summary: Self-hosted AI agent and RAG platform. Index your code, docs, and data into Qdrant and answer over them, run a tool-calling agent, and drive multi-step pipelines across pluggable LLM backends. Runs as a Docker Compose stack.

title: Saritaa2710/SurfSense
summary: 🤖 Enhance your research with SurfSense, a customizable AI agent that connects to multiple platforms for smarter, effective information retrieval.

title: Chris31372/better-chat
summary: 🤖 Build an AI chat app with multi-model support, secure user data isolation, and advanced features like model integration and persistent conversation management.

title: NavisualGuide/navisual
summary: AI desktop guide that shows you where to click — it observes, never clicks. Free tier (no sign-up), BYOK or local Ollama, source-available.
